process.title: Launch your business in 5 simple steps
process.description: From account creation to product delivery, Kiiako supports you at every step to turn your passion into a profitable business.

1.title: Free registration
1.description: Create your Kiiako account in seconds. No registration fees, no credit card required.

2.label: STEP 2
2.title: Create your store
2.description: Customize your store with your domain name, add your products, set your prices, and you're ready to sell.

3.label: STEP 3
3.title: Receive your orders
3.description: Your customers discover your products and place orders directly from your professional online store.

4.label: STEP 4
4.title: Collect payments

5.label: STEP 5
5.title: Assured delivery
5.description: Our integrated delivery system ships your products directly to your customers. You track everything from your dashboard.

items.name: Marie Mumbanza
items.text: Kiiako transformed my business. In 6 months, I tripled my turnover. Integrated delivery and Mobile Money payments make everything so simple. My customers love the fluidity of my online store.

items.name: Jean-Pierre Okonda
items.text: I now sell throughout the DRC thanks to Kiiako's delivery system. Customer support is exceptional, and the dashboard allows me to manage everything easily. I highly recommend this platform.

items.name: Fatou Diallo
items.text: With my custom domain name and multiple shops on Kiiako, I was able to professionalize my image. I now manage over 500 orders a month and my income has exploded.

hero.title: Your payment security, our absolute priority
hero.description: Protect your customers with a fully secure banking and Mobile Money payment system. Every transaction is encrypted, verified and validated by our partner Paydunya, guaranteeing complete trust at every step.

features.title: End-to-end secure payments

confirmation.description: A confirmation is sent as soon as the payment is validated.

process.title: How does a secure payment work?

client.title: Customer chooses Mobile Money
client.description: The customer selects their preferred Mobile Money operator (Orange Money, MTN, Moov, etc.) to make the payment.

redirection.title: Secure redirection to Paydunya
redirection.description: The transaction is redirected to the secure Paydunya platform with SSL/TLS encryption.

ussd.title: Payment via USSD on mobile
ussd.description: The customer receives a USSD code on their phone to confirm the payment securely.

confirmation.title: Instant Confirmation
confirmation.description: The payment is confirmed instantly and securely by Paydunya.

validation.title: Order automatically validated
validation.description: The order is automatically validated and you receive a notification. The customer also receives their confirmation.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Kiiako plans and payments.

payments.question: What payment methods are accepted?
payments.answer: Your customers can pay via Mobile Money (Orange, MTN, Moov, Wave) and credit card (Visa, Mastercard). Everything is already natively integrated.

domain.question: Can I use my own domain name?
domain.answer: Yes, every seller automatically benefits from a personalized domain name for free as soon as their store is created.

withdrawals.question: How do withdrawals work?
withdrawals.answer: You can withdraw your earnings to your Mobile Money account at any time from your dashboard. Transfers are processed within 24 hours.

commitment.question: Is there a time commitment?
commitment.answer: No, our plans are non-binding. You can cancel or change plans at any time from your settings.

commission.question: Does Kiiako take a commission on sales?
commission.answer: No, Kiiako does not take any commission on your sales. Only the technical processing fees from our payment partner apply.

hero.title: Your delivery company, <1>connected to Kiiako</1>
hero.subtitle: Register your delivery company, manage your fleet of drivers, cover multiple areas and receive real-time missions from Kiiako stores.

steps.title: How does it work?
steps.subtitle: 6 steps to register your company and start receiving missions.

dossier.title: Fill in the company file
dossier.desc: Submit your company's information: name, address, TIN, official document and logo.

validation.title: Validation by Kiiako
validation.desc: Our team checks your file. You will be notified via WhatsApp once your account is approved.

zones.title: Define your zones
zones.desc: Choose the cities and neighborhoods covered by your company. Your drivers can also define their own zones.

invitation.title: Invite your drivers
invitation.desc: Add your drivers by email. They receive an invitation and create their account under your company.

missions.title: Accept missions
missions.desc: Merchants in your zones assign orders to you. Distribute them to your available drivers.

wallet.title: Manage your wallet
wallet.desc: Earnings from all your missions are centralized in a company wallet. Withdraw via Mobile Money.

advantages.title: Why choose Company status?
advantages.subtitle: More missions, more zones, centralized management.

flotte.title: Fleet management
flotte.desc: Invite your drivers, manage their status and view their availability from a dashboard.

zones.title: Multi-zone coverage
zones.desc: Your company can cover multiple cities simultaneously. Each driver manages their own neighborhoods.

wallet.title: Centralized company wallet
wallet.desc: A single wallet for all your drivers. Commission reduced to 20% versus 15% for independents.

badge.title: Verified badge
badge.desc: Your company displays an official badge with merchants. TIN and documents validated by Kiiako.

reputation.title: Collective reputation
reputation.desc: Each delivery contributes to your company's overall rating. A good score attracts more missions.

stats.title: Statistics & tracking
stats.desc: Track missions, revenue, and fleet performance from the dedicated company interface.

requirements.title: Required documents
requirements.subtitle: Prepare these items before starting your registration.
list: Official document: RCCM, statutes or equivalent
Mobile Money account for withdrawals (MTN, Moov, Wave)

items.q: What is the difference between an independent driver and a company?
items.a: An independent driver acts alone. A company can manage a fleet of drivers, cover multiple zones, and has a collective wallet. The company commission is 20% vs 15% for independents.

items.q: How do I invite my drivers?
items.a: From your company dashboard, you can invite drivers by email. They receive a link to create their account under your company.
Yes. Your company can select zones in multiple cities. Each driver can also define their own neighborhoods.

items.q: How are earnings distributed between the company and drivers?
items.a: Gross earnings arrive in the company wallet. It is up to the company to remunerate its drivers according to its own internal rules.

items.q: Is the validation file different from that of a driver?
items.a: Yes. For a company, Kiiako verifies legal documents (TIN, RCCM) and the logo. The process may take 24 to 72 hours.

cta.title: Register your company
cta.subtitle: File submitted in 10 minutes. Validation within 24-72h. Fleet operational quickly.

hero.title: Deliver with Kiiako, <1>earn at your own pace</1>
hero.subtitle: Join the Kiiako independent drivers network. Choose your zones, your hours, and withdraw your earnings via Mobile Money.

howItWorks.title: How it works?
howItWorks.subtitle: 6 simple steps to start delivering and earning money with Kiiako.

steps.title: Create your account
steps.desc: Sign up in minutes with your phone number and email. Choose the "Independent Driver" profile.

steps.title: Submit your documents
steps.desc: Upload your ID (ID card, passport) and a profile picture. Our team validates your file within 24h.

steps.title: Choose your zones
steps.desc: Select the neighborhoods and cities where you want to deliver. You can change your zones at any time.

steps.title: Activate your availability
steps.desc: Toggle your status to 'Available' when you are ready to deliver. Turn it off when you are not.

steps.title: Accept missions
steps.desc: Receive notifications for orders in your zones. Accept, deliver, and get the confirmation signed.

steps.title: Withdraw your earnings
steps.desc: Your earnings are credited to your wallet after each confirmed delivery. Withdraw via MTN, Moov or Wave.

items.title: Mobile Money Wallet
items.desc: All your earnings are centralized. Withdraw whenever you want via MTN, Moov or Wave.

items.title: Flexible zones
items.desc: Choose exactly which neighborhoods you deliver to. Change them at any time.

items.title: Free hours
items.desc: No hour commitments. Activate or deactivate your availability with a toggle.

items.title: Profile and reputation
items.desc: Each delivery generates a review. A good profile brings you more missions.

items.title: Verified account
items.desc: Your verified badge inspires trust to the merchants who choose you.

items.title: Real-time notifications
items.desc: Get instantly alerted via WhatsApp for each new mission in your zone.
You receive a notification with the delivery details.
Pick up the package at the merchant and go deliver.
Hand the package to the customer. The mission status changes to Delivered.
The merchant confirms. Your earnings are credited instantly.

requirements.title: What you need to register
requirements.subtitle: No complicated paperwork. Just the essentials.
items: A valid ID (ID Card or Passport)
An active Mobile Money number (MTN, Moov or Wave)
Your city and neighborhood of residence

items.a: Each delivery is paid according to a base price + an amount per kilometer. Kiiako takes a 15% commission on each mission.

items.q: When do I get my money?
items.a: Your earnings are immediately credited to your Kiiako wallet after delivery confirmation. You can withdraw at any time.

items.q: Can I deliver for multiple stores?
items.a: Yes. As soon as you are available in a zone, all stores in this zone can assign missions to you.
ID card, Passport, or driver's license depending on the country.

items.q: Can I join a delivery company?
items.a: Yes. If a company sends you an invitation by email, you can join their fleet while keeping your account.

inscription.title: Join Kiiako from WhatsApp

items.label: Driver registration

security.title: Secure and robust
security.desc: The bot uses the official WhatsApp Business API (Meta). Each message is verified before processing.

items.title: HMAC-SHA256 Signature
items.desc: Each WhatsApp webhook is cryptographically verified before being processed.

items.title: Rate limiting
items.desc: 10 messages/min per user, 300 webhooks/min. No abuse possible.

items.title: Automatic retry
items.desc: In case of temporary error, the bot automatically retries with exponential backoff.

items.title: GPS location
items.desc: The bot sends the exact customer location to the driver via native WhatsApp message.

litiges.title: Dispute management
litiges.desc: When a customer reports a problem, the bot automatically asks for an explanation. The reason is transmitted to the backend and the driver. The Kiiako team is alerted to arbitrate.

simulator.title: Try the bot yourself
simulator.desc: Discover the power of the Kiiako interactive assistant directly from this page. Type your requests, click the buttons, and see how the bot responds instantly.

keyword.title: Enter a keyword

interactions.title: Click interactions
interactions.desc: The interface automatically generates quick action buttons (exactly like on real WhatsApp iOS) for smooth navigation without keyboard.

mockup.description: Discover step-by-step how to launch your first e-commerce store on Kiiako. From choosing your domain name to adding your first product, we support you for an ultra-fast launch.

similarVideos.title: Set up Mobile Money in Benin

sidebar.desc: Our advisors are here to help you personally.

mockup.title: How to change my domain name?
mockup.content: By default, your Kiiako store is accessible at an address like 'my-store.kiiako.com'. However, to strengthen your brand image, you can connect your own domain name.
steps: Go to your Dashboard > Settings > Domains.
Follow the provided DNS configuration instructions.
mockup.note: DNS propagation can take up to 48 hours. If your domain doesn't appear immediately, don't panic!

sidebar.desc: Our advisors are available 24/7 on WhatsApp.

mockup.title: How to set up Mobile Money in Benin
mockup.author: Léonce K.
content: Mobile Money has become the pillar of the digital economy in West Africa. For a Kiiako merchant in Benin, setting up this payment method is the first step to gaining the trust of local customers.
Nearly 70% of e-commerce transactions in Benin are made via MTN Mobile Money or Moov Money. Not offering these options means cutting yourself off from the majority of the potential market.
Make sure your payout phone number is indeed the one linked to your Kiiako merchant account to avoid any processing delays.

mockup.title: How Fatou <1>revolutionized her brand</1> in Dakar.
mockup.challenge: Before Kiiako, Fatou managed her entire customer flow manually via WhatsApp. Between inventory management, repetitive order taking, and pricing questions, 80% of her time was spent on administrative tasks rather than creation.
mockup.solution: Setting up her Kiiako store automated the entire purchasing journey. By centralizing her catalog with a single store link, she transformed her social networks into true passive sales channels.
mockup.quote: Kiiako breathed a new dynamic into my vision. I'm no longer just a creator, I'm now a <1>true brand manager</1> in full expansion.
mockup.nextStory: From Dakar to international export: <1>Mamadou's story.</1>

legal.title: Legal <1>Notice</1>
legal.subtitle: Mandatory information regarding the publisher and host of the site.

sections.title: Site Edition
sections.content: The Kiiako website is published by Tech N Ctrl, SARL U (Société à Responsabilité Limité Unipersonnel), with a capital of 1,000,000 Francs CFA. Registered office: Adidogomé Sagbado 400m from the Logoté market. RCCM: TG-LFW-01-2024-B13-00605. NIF: 1001936284.

sections.title: Contact and Responsibility
sections.content: Email: piouhassan@gmail.com | Phone: + (228) 92 36 35 33. The publication manager is Tech N Ctrl Sarl U.

sections.title: Hosting
sections.content: The site is hosted by Hostinger.

sections.title: Intellectual Property
sections.content: The site is the exclusive property of Tech N Ctrl Sarl U. Any reproduction or representation, in whole or in part, made without the author's consent is unlawful.

legal.note: Kiiako is committed to scrupulously respecting applicable regulatory frameworks to guarantee maximum security for its users and merchants.

privacy.title: Privacy <1>Policy</1>
privacy.subtitle: Compliance with Law No. 2019-014 of October 29, 2019, of the Togolese Republic.
privacy.note: Your privacy is our priority. Kiiako uses state-of-the-art encryption protocols to ensure that your personal data remains strictly confidential and secure.

sections.title: 1. Legal Framework
sections.content: To regulate data use and guarantee privacy protection, Kiiako complies with Law No. 2019-014 of October 29, 2019, of the Togolese Republic. This law governs collection, processing, transmission, storage, and use of personal data, ensuring respect for fundamental freedoms.

sections.title: 2. Data Controller
sections.content: The kiiako.io website and its services are operated by Tech N Ctrl. As the operator, Tech N Ctrl acts as the controller for personal data collected via the platform and commits to processing it in compliance with current regulations.

sections.title: 3. Scope
sections.content: This policy applies to all data collected via the kiiako.io site, the Kiiako solution, and Tech N Ctrl's digital services. By using our services, you acknowledge that you have read this policy.

sections.title: 4. Personal Data Collected
sections.content:
• Automatic data: IP address, browser type, location, cookies.
• Voluntary data: name, email, phone, address, payment info.
• Delivery data: driver's license, vehicle info, real-time location (only during missions).
• Device access: microphone, camera, geolocation (only if necessary).

sections.title: 5. Purpose of Processing
sections.content:
• Provide and maintain services (stores and deliveries)
• Manage accounts, contracts, and delivery missions
• Improve user experience
• Prevent fraud and ensure security
• Comply with legal obligations

sections.title: 6. Legal Basis for Processing
sections.content: Processing is based on consent, contract execution, legal obligation, or Tech N Ctrl's legitimate interests.

sections.title: 7. Data Retention
sections.content: Data is kept only for the duration necessary for the intended purposes, then deleted or anonymized.

sections.title: 8. Data Security
sections.content:
Tech N Ctrl implements technical measures to protect data against:
• Unauthorized access
• Loss or destruction
• Unauthorized disclosure

sections.title: 9. Data Sharing
sections.content: Data is neither sold nor rented. Sharing is possible only with technical providers or if required by law.

sections.title: 10. Vendor Customers' Data
sections.content: The vendor is responsible for processing their customers' data. Tech N Ctrl acts as a technical host and service provider.

sections.title: 11. Cookies
sections.content:
• Essential cookies: necessary for operation.
• Analytical cookies: anonymous usage statistics.

sections.title: 12. International Transfer
sections.content: Transfers carried out in compliance with legal data protection requirements.

sections.title: 13. User Rights
sections.content:
You have the following rights:
• Access and rectification
• Erasure and limitation
• Portability and objection

sections.title: 14. Third-Party Links
sections.content: Tech N Ctrl is not responsible for the privacy policies of third-party sites accessible via links on our platform.

sections.title: 15. Modifications
sections.content: We reserve the right to modify this policy at any time. Any changes will be published on this page.

sections.title: 16. Contact
sections.content: For any questions or to exercise your rights, contact us at: contact@technctrl.com

terms.title: Terms and <1>Conditions</1>
terms.subtitle: Effective as of 06/01/2024. Rules governing the use of Kiiako.

sections.title: Article 1: Service Publisher
sections.content: The Kiiako solution is published by Tech N Ctrl. Email: contact@technctrl.com. Tech N Ctrl is the exclusive owner and operator of the platform.

sections.title: Article 2: Definitions
sections.content:
• Solution / Platform: kiiako.io
• User: any person using the site.
• Vendor: user who has created a store.
• Driver / Partner: service provider handling deliveries.
• Final Client: buyer on a Kiiako store.

sections.title: Article 3: Purpose of the Solution
sections.content: Kiiako allows creating e-commerce stores and managing delivery missions. Kiiako is a technical provider and is not a party to sales or transport contracts between vendors, drivers, and clients.

sections.title: Article 4: Registration
sections.content: Account creation requires accurate information. The user is solely responsible for the confidentiality of their credentials and actions performed through their account.

sections.title: Article 5: Subscription and Access
sections.content: Access may be subject to subscription (monthly/annual). In case of non-payment, Kiiako reserves the right to suspend, limit, or delete access to services.

sections.title: Article 6: Responsibilities
sections.content:
• Vendors: responsible for their products and stocks.
• Drivers: responsible for transport, parcel security, and deadlines.
• Kiiako: disclaims all liability in case of dispute, loss, or damage during transport.

sections.title: Article 7: Payments
sections.content: Kiiako provides the technical infrastructure. Payments are processed by third-party services chosen by the vendor. Kiiako is not responsible for transaction failures or fraud.

sections.title: Article 8: User Content
sections.content: The user guarantees they own the rights to their content. Illegal, fraudulent, or defamatory content is prohibited. Kiiako may delete any non-compliant content.

sections.title: Article 9: Account Suspension
sections.content: Kiiako may suspend or delete a user account in case of Terms violation, fraud, or abusive activity, potentially without notice in case of serious misconduct.

sections.title: Article 10: Availability
sections.content: Kiiako strives to ensure service availability but cannot be held responsible for interruptions (maintenance, updates, failures, or force majeure).

sections.title: Article 11: Intellectual Property
sections.content: The Kiiako platform (software, interface, graphics) is protected. Vendors retain ownership of the content published on their own store.

sections.title: Article 12: Data Protection
sections.content: Data is processed according to Togolese Law No. 2019-014. Rights of access and rectification via contact@technctrl.com.

sections.title: Article 13: Cookies
sections.content: Used for user experience and statistics. Disabling possible via browser settings.

sections.title: Article 14: Limitation of Liability
sections.content: Tech N Ctrl is not responsible for loss of revenue, data, or indirect damages related to platform use.

sections.title: Article 15: Modification of Terms
sections.content: Tech N Ctrl may modify the Terms at any time. New conditions apply upon publication.

sections.title: Article 16: Applicable Law
sections.content: These Terms are governed by Togolese law. Togolese courts shall have exclusive jurisdiction in case of dispute.

terms.note: Using Kiiako implies full and unconditional acceptance of these terms. These rules are designed to protect merchants, drivers, and end consumers for a healthy and transparent commerce.
